name: Nuoc Cham
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine garlic, shallot, chili, and sugar in a mortar and pestle. Pound to form a paste.
2. Stir in fish sauce, lime juice, vinegar, and water until the sugar is completely dissolved.
3. Stir in the finely shredded carrot.
4. Alternatively, combine all ingredients in a jar with a tight-fitting lid and shake until well blended.
